name: Festive Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, cream together the softened cream cheese, brown sugar, cinnamon, ground ginger, salt, and vanilla until light and fluffy using an electric mixer on medium speed.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the mashed pumpkin and milk.
4. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes or until a knife inserted halfway between the edge and center comes out clean.
7. Cool slightly on a wire rack.
8. In a separate bowl, blend the sour cream and sugar together.
9. Spread the mixture over the warm pie.
10. Return the pie to the oven and bake an additional 3 to 5 minutes or until the topping is set.
11. Let cool on a wire rack before serving.
